name: West Loch Estate
desc: Residential subdivision near West Loch — quiet streets, local parks, convenient to both Pearl City and Ewa corridors.
insider: West Loch Golf Course next door is one of the best-value municipal courses on Oahu — $55 for 18 holes with Pearl Harbor views
The neighborhood is surprisingly quiet despite being sandwiched between major roads — the cul-de-sac layout buffers the noise
Pearl Harbor views peek through from some of the elevated lots on the eastern edge — a nice perk few people expect
It's one of the more affordable options with 1990s-era homes in the Pearl City/Ewa corridor — solid construction, decent condition
West Loch Shoreline Park is a hidden gem with walking paths, fishing spots, and views across the loch to Pearl Harbor
The community is predominantly local families — potluck gatherings in driveways and kids riding bikes in the streets are everyday scenes
Nearest grocery is the Safeway or Times in Pearl City — a 5-10 minute drive, nothing walkable within the subdivision
The West Loch Fairways neighborhood within the estate has the nicest homes — backing up to the golf course with green space views
Pearl City High School is the district school and is well-regarded for its athletic programs and college-prep courses
The annual West Loch community garage sale is a popular neighborhood event — families sell everything from furniture to surfboards
